title: Discount of Up to Â£3,750 on Electric Cars Set to Slash Costs for Thousands
content: Drivers across the UK will soon enjoy discounts on dozens of new electric car models after the Transport Secretary today (15 July 2025) announced a Â£650 million grant scheme worth up to Â£3,750 per car, putting more money back in working peopleâ€™s pockets as part of the Plan for Change and making owning an electric car a reality for thousands. Supporting the manifesto commitment to phase out the sale of new petrol and diesel cars by 2030, the Â£650 million Electric Car Grant (ECG) will back UK and other manufacturers, with eligibility dependent on the highest manufacturing sustainability standards.
author: Analysts Account
